_comment: Focus-block configuration for the weekly generator (spec Section 3.4 / SKILL.md Section 4). Blocks are CONFIGURED here, not hardcoded: name, length, days/week, tier, and session templates. Two concurrent blocks (skill + strength don't interfere). PROTECT strength percentages feed the deterministic load calc — no weights are written here. Spec-default blocks: 6-wk ring-MU skill block (3x/wk) + front-squat/strict-press strength emphasis (2x/wk, PROTECT). 'current_week' is early/mid block (normal week, not a deload). v1.1 policy: where the class already covers a PROTECT lift (heavy squats), defer the heavy stimulus to class and substitute the low-CNS 'complement' (quad/knee supporting work) appended to a non-clashing class day — never a competing barbell front squat. ISSUE #3: each template's 'emphasis' is now a structured 'current focus' — a name, optional 'reference' to a program/drill file in references/, optional program week/length (auto-advances by block week), an optional explicit 'this_week' drill list, and 'cues'. When 'this_week' is omitted and a reference is given, the generator pulls this week's drills straight from the referenced file (single source of truth). A plain string still works (treated as cues).

templates.name: Front Squat strength (paused)

emphasis.name: Squat 12-week block
emphasis.cues: Clean stand-up: 3s pause in the hole, stay vertical out of the front rack.

movements: Paused Front Squat (3s pause in the hole) — attacks the clean stand-up (recovery-limited)

emphasis.name: Knee / tendon rehab
emphasis.cues: Quad development + knee health — class already supplies the heavy squat stimulus this week.

emphasis.name: Strict press / strict-HSPU strength
emphasis.cues: Overhead press is the genuine weak link (SP 70 vs 80 goal) — class under-supplies it; this is the protected lift this week.
this_week: Strict Press — top single @ RPE 8, then 3x5 @ 75% (dedicated overhead volume)
